name: Landing Approach Sequence Configuration
description: You are an Agricultural UAV Technician preparing a spray drone for autonomous operations. The target field is bordered by a 15-meter tall eucalyptus windbreak on the north side, making the standard direct-descent return-to-base unsafe. Configure a specialized landing approach sequence in QGroundControl using the coordinates, altitudes, and vehicle parameters specified in the operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/landing_ops_brief.txt. The mission must include a takeoff, a survey waypoint at 50m, a landing approach initiated by a DO_LAND_START command (MAV_CMD 189) with at least two decreasing altitude waypoints, and a final LAND command (MAV_CMD 21) at the base station. Save the mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/approach_landing.plan and configure the ArduPilot parameters (LAND_SPEED, LAND_ALT_LOW, and WPNAV_SPEED_DN) according to the brief.
